titel.description: Course title - must be a string and is required

raum.description: Assigned studio room - must be a string and is required

dauer.description: Duration in minutes - must be an integer between 15 and 180 and is required

maxTeilnehmer.description: Maximum participants count - must be an integer and is required

trainer_id.description: FK referencing the trainer - must be an objectId and is required
